summary: HANUM Laundry: Backend 26/26 pytest passed (100%); Frontend all critical flows verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Login (owner), staff dashboard with stat cards, POS add-to-cart + save -> receipt with Share PDF, Orders list with filter chips + detail sheet, Customers CRUD, More menu with 5 entries (Pengeluaran/Kas/Laporan/Layanan/Pengguna), Reports page rendering, and Customer portal (Klaim Nota + Pesan Laundry) all working. Role auto-assign by registration order confirmed via API (owner/admin/pelanggan) and role enforcement (kasir blocked from /reports, /users, DELETE /orders; pelanggan blocked from staff endpoints) verified. Invoice format INV-YYMMDD-#### and kode_tracking generated correctly; subtotal/diskon/total computed correctly (3*7000 + 2*5000 - 10% = 27,900). Bluetooth printing was NOT tested per request; only preview + Share PDF verified.

issues: React Native Web console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but should be migrated.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo expects: expo@~54.0.35 (have 54.0.34), expo-font@~14.0.12 (have 14.0.11), expo-router@~6.0.24 (have 6.0.23). Run 'npx expo install --check' / 'npx expo install --fix' to align. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log

action_items: (Optional) Update Expo SDK 54 sub-packages (expo, expo-font, expo-router) to the versions expected by SDK 54.0.35 via 'npx expo install --fix'.
(Optional) Replace deprecated 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' and 'pointerEvents' prop with style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~686 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, services, customers, orders, expenses, cash, reports) once features grow beyond MVP.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via clean() helper across all responses — good.
JWT token only stores 'sub'; role resolved at request-time via DB lookup so role changes propagate without re-login — good.

/api/orders/customer creates an order with an INV invoice number even though it is unpaid + perlu_timbang; this inflates invoice sequence and could create gaps. Consider deferring invoice numbering until kasir weighs/processes.
seed_data_creation: Created test users uitest_*@hanum.id (pelanggan), kasir_<uniq>@test.id (kasir, promoted), pel_<uniq>@test.id (pelanggan); test customers TEST_CUST_*, TEST_UI_CUST, TEST_DEL, TEST_E2E_CUST, TEST_ORD_*; multiple TEST_ orders/expenses/cash entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Owner credentials owner@hanum.id/owner123 still valid. Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_hanum_backend.py is idempotent (uses uuid-suffixed records) and can be re-run via 'pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v'. Frontend served at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://laundry-checkout-app.preview.emergentagent.com. Bluetooth printing intentionally non-functional in preview — do not test that path.
